name: Power-Up Pickup
description: A collectible that grants a temporary buff. On pickup, prints an activation message and starts a timer. When the timer expires, prints a deactivation message. Uses DoOnce to prevent re-collection.

customizable.powerup_name: Name of the power-up (default: Speed Boost)
customizable.duration: Duration of the buff in seconds (default: 10.0)
customizable.activate_message: Message on pickup (default: Speed Boost activated!)
customizable.expire_message: Message when buff ends (default: Speed Boost expired)

blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_PowerUp}}
PARENT: Actor

VAR Collected: Bool = false

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Collected]
NODE n3: Branch
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=Collected]
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="{{activate_message|Speed Boost activated!}}"]
NODE n6: Delay [Duration={{duration|10.0}}]
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="{{expire_message|Speed Boost expired}}"]
NODE n8: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.False -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Completed -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.Condition [Bool]

example_spawn.notes: Place at pickup height. DoOnce prevents double-collection. Actor destroys itself after buff expires.
